raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 and there is free space on the left side of the stacked boxes to apply gentle lateral constraint.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of the stack shifting while box_1 is being separated/lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is reachable by the right arm; the right end-effector has access to opposing sides of box_1 (not blocked by the table surface) and the left arm is stabilizing box_2 to counter separation forces from the 'attached_to' contact.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the right end-effector with sufficient frictional contact to lift and peel it away from box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The right end-effector maintains a stable hold on box_1 and there is vertical clearance above box_1 to lift; box_2 remains stabilized so it does not lift with box_1 despite the 'attached_to' relationship.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is lifted upward, separated from box_2, and is no longer in contact with the table or box_2 (dark box picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector can reach the side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 and there is free space on the left side of the stacked boxes to apply gentle lateral constraint.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of the stack shifting while box_1 is being separated/lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is reachable by the right arm; the right end-effector has access to opposing sides of box_1 (not blocked by the table surface) and the left arm is stabilizing box_2 to counter separation forces from the 'attached_to' contact.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the right end-effector with sufficient frictional contact to lift and peel it away from box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right end-effector maintains a stable hold on box_1 and there is vertical clearance above box_1 to lift; box_2 remains stabilized so it does not lift with box_1 despite the 'attached_to' relationship.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is lifted upward, separated from box_2, and is no longer in contact with the table or box_2 (dark box picked up).
